summary: Full backend + frontend testing of Leela Vigil Solutions site. Backend: 8/8 pytest cases passed (health, quote submit valid+invalid+optional service, listing with no _id leak, persistence verification). Frontend: home page renders all 7 services, contact info (both emails, phone, Mysuru hours Mon-Sat 9:30 / Sunday closed), floating WhatsApp button with correct +916362554499 number, all 7 service detail pages route correctly with back-to-home button, quote form submits successfully and opens WhatsApp in new tab with pre-filled message containing user data, success toast shown, no JS console errors.

issues: Browser tab title is generic 'Emergent | Fullstack App' — should be set to 'Leela Vigil Solutions' in /app/frontend/public/index.html for branding/SEO

Back-to-home button navigates to '/#services' (scrolls to services section on home) rather than top of home '/'. Functionally OK but if intent was to land at hero, consider routing to '/' without hash.

action_items: (Optional) Update <title> tag in /app/frontend/public/index.html to 'Leela Vigil Solutions — Smart Security Mysuru' for branding
(Optional) Decide if back-to-home should land at top of home or scroll to services section
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: Code is clean, async-correct, _id excluded via projection {'_id': 0}, Pydantic validation with min/max length, EmailStr — good.
Resend email gracefully no-ops when RESEND_API_KEY empty (returns False) — submission still persists and whatsapp_url returned. Matches expected behavior.
QuoteForm.jsx uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL correctly via env. data-testid present on all inputs/submit.
All 7 service slugs match exactly: cctv-surveillance, lan-networking, biometric-access, fire-smoke-systems, door-sensors, shutter-sensors, motion-sensors.
test_credentials: N/A — no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: Created 3 test quote submissions in MongoDB via API (TEST_ prefixed names: TEST_User, TEST_NoService, TEST E2E User). Not cleaned up since collection is not user-facing seed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py is fully passing (8/8). RESEND_API_KEY is intentionally empty so email_sent=false is expected — do NOT mark this as a failure. Frontend public URL: https://leela-vigil.preview.emergentagent.com. WhatsApp pre-fill verified to open in new tab with phone 916362554499.
rca of the issue: No issues found requiring RCA. All requested features verified working end-to-end.
